title: Decarlos Brown Incompetent for Trial in Zarutska Murder
summary: Accused of fatally stabbing Iryna Zarutska on the CATS light rail, Decarlos Brown has been deemed incompetent to stand trial.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the complexities of the legal system when dealing with defendants with mental health issues.

title: Zakk Wylde's Black Label Society to Rock Charlotte
summary: Zakk Wylde's Black Label Society, along with Zakk Sabbath and Dark Chapel, will perform at The Fillmore on April 10.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's vibrant music scene and its ability to attract well-known artists.

title: Four Arrested in Cornelius Gun Shop Break-in
summary: Four individuals have been arrested for allegedly breaking into Harrison Precision, a gun shop located on Old Statesville Road in Cornelius.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about gun violence and security in the community.

title: Frost Possible Overnight, Warm Weekend Ahead
summary: Patchy frost is possible overnight, so protect sensitive vegetation. Temperatures are expected to rise into the mid-80s this weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides important weather information for residents to prepare for temperature fluctuations.

title: Charlotte Front-Runner to Host 2027 WTA Finals
summary: Charlotte is emerging as a leading candidate to host the prestigious WTA Finals in 2027, showcasing the city's growing sports infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Hosting the WTA Finals would boost Charlotte's economy and reputation as a major sports destination.

title: Union County Commissioner Gary Sides Dies After Resignation
summary: Gary Sides, a long-serving member of the Union County Board of Commissioners and Board of Education, has died of brain cancer.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the loss of a dedicated public servant and his contributions to the community.

title: Crime Reduction Celebrated in West, Northwest Charlotte
summary: Malcolm Graham highlights significant crime reduction in west and northwest Charlotte. Full citywide statistics are due next week.
charlotte_impact: Indicates positive trends in public safety in specific areas of Charlotte.

title: Deadly Explosion at Mooresville Beverage Plant
summary: A chemical explosion at a beverage plant in Mooresville resulted in one fatality and is under investigation by state and federal authorities.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about workplace safety and the potential hazards in industrial settings.

title: Mecklenburg Debates Resource Center Expansion Amid Budget Concerns
summary: Mecklenburg County is debating expanding community resource centers, balancing the need for services with budget constraints.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the ongoing challenge of allocating resources to meet community needs.

title: Airport Construction Threatens Animal Shelter Enrichment Area
summary: Volunteers at the Charlotte animal shelter report that airport construction will demolish trails used for dog walks.
charlotte_impact: Draws attention to the impact of development on animal welfare and community resources.

title: North Carolina Invests $5.7M in Addiction Treatment
summary: North Carolina is investing $5.7 million to support addiction treatment services statewide, according to Gov. Stein.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the ongoing opioid crisis and the state's efforts to combat addiction.

title: New Jersey Homicide Suspect Arrested in Mecklenburg
summary: Ronald Lawrence, wanted for attempted homicide in New Jersey, has been arrested in Mecklenburg County and awaits extradition.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the effectiveness of law enforcement in apprehending fugitives.

title: Car Fire Shuts Down I-85 in University City
summary: A car fire has closed all southbound lanes of I-85 near the I-485 interchange in University City, causing traffic delays.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about traffic disruptions and potential safety hazards.

title: Salisbury Woman Charged in Teen Drowning at Myrtle Beach
summary: Brittany Nicole Neely is charged after 14-year-old Nevaeh Neely drowned at a Myrtle Beach hotel.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the legal consequences of negligence and the tragic loss of a young life.

title: Woman Reacts to Father's Arrest in Mother's Murder
summary: Eddie McCollum, 61, is charged with first-degree murder in the shooting death of his wife, Tammy McCollum, in north Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the devastating impact of domestic violence and the grief experienced by families.
